title: Delpya capitata
taxonomy: Delpya capitata is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Aizoaceae, commonly known as the ice plant family. It belongs to the genus Delpya, which is a small genus of succulent plants. The plant is native to South Africa, where it can be found growing in rocky and sandy areas. Delpya capitata is a succulent species with distinctive leaves and stems, and it produces small, white flowers. It is a member of the subfamily Ruschioideae, which is a group of succulent plants that are native to southern Africa.
